name: Hip-bump sweep from closed guard
description: Sit up, post on far foot, swing the elbow up and over while bumping the hips.

name: Knee-cut pass with cross-face
description: Slice the inside knee through, kill the inside frame, drive the cross-face, settle into top side.

name: S-mount armbar from mount
description: From high mount, climb to S-mount by stepping over the head, isolate the arm, fall back for the armbar.

name: Bow-and-arrow choke from the back
description: From back control with seatbelt, feed the collar, grab the same-side knee, rotate off and finish.

name: Inside heel hook from saddle
description: From saddle / inside sankaku, control the leg, expose the heel, finish with the breaking mechanic.

name: Lasso hip-bump sweep
description: From lasso guard with sleeve grip and lasso leg, off-balance and swing through to come on top.

name: Knee-shield to deep half entry
description: From half-guard bottom with knee shield, kick the leg through and dive under to deep half.

name: Single-leg X entry from butterfly guard
description: From seated butterfly with arm-drag, dive under and establish single-leg X on the far leg.

name: Snap-down to front headlock
description: From a collar tie, snap the head down hard and follow into a front headlock with arm trap.

name: Top half guard underhook to mount
description: From top half guard with underhook, free the trapped leg by walking the foot up, slide knee across to mount.
